title: Right to Refund or Replacement
summary: Consumers have the right to seek refund, replacement, or repair for defective goods or deficient services.

plainExplanation.whatItMeans: If a product or service does not meet promised standards, you can demand corrective action.
plainExplanation.whyItMatters: This protects consumers from unfair business practices.

exampleScenario.situation: An online order arrives damaged and seller refuses refund.
exampleScenario.explanation: Consumer can demand refund under law.
